calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-21-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yayoi Sinada, Plaintiff; Dr. George Y. Takahashi, Defendant; Tim Rebbert, representative for University of California - San Francisco ["UCSF"].

2:02 pm - Court in session, not reported. The parties state their apeparances. At the outset, the Court notes the Plaintiff's contention that UCSF is not a party to the action. Mr. Rebbert addresses the contention, noting that UCSF is identified as a party in the original Complaint. The Court notes that the Amended Complaint does not identify UCSF as a party. Mr. Rebbert notes there has not been a dismissal of UCSF filed. The Court questions Ms. Sinada as to her intentions. Ms Sinada affirms that she has dismissed but in any event is now dismissing UCSF.

2:06 pm - The Court so notes and finds that UCSF is dismissed from the action and no longer a party. Mr. Rebbert contends that notwithstanding the ostensible dismissal of the party for whom he represents, as the claims adjuster for the University and as Dr. Takahashi is an employee of the University, he is entitled to speak. The Court determines that only Dr. Takahashi may speak in his own behalf.

2:07 pm - The clerk places Ms. Sinada and Dr. Takahashi under oath. Ms. Sinada commences presentation of the case.

2:15 pm - Ms. Sinada introduces Plaintiff's Exhibit 1. At the Court's invitation, the exhibit is moved into evidence. Dr. Takahashi expresses no objection and the Court admits Plaintiff's Exhibit 1 into evidence. Ms. Sinada concludes presentation of the case. Dr. Takahashi has no examination of Ms. Sinada.

2:16 pm - Dr. takahashi briefly addresses the Court and refers the Court to Defendant's trial brief, marked as Defendant's Exhibit A. At the Court's invitation, the exhibit is moved into evidence. Ms. Sinada expresses no objection and the Court admits Defendant's Exhibit A into evidence.

2:18 pm - Ms. Sinada briefky commences cross-examination of Dr. Takahashi then concludes.

2:21 pm - The Court takes the matter under submission.

2:22 pm - After brief discussion, Court adjourns.

Judge: Hon. Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D305)
